Each image can have its own tap action that opens a URL (\u003Ccode>web_url\u003C\/code>) or sends a postback to your webhook (\u003Ccode>postback\u003C\/code>), and you can add an optional title, The same change applies to message echoes and Conversations API responses.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Required permissions:\"]},\" The catalog and search endpoints require an app access token (no additional permissions). Sending stickers requires \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"pages_messaging\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperPre.react"},"name":"DeveloperPre"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 1, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-06-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Sticker API for Messenger Platform &#x2014; browse, search, and send stickers, plus webhook sticker type support with 90-day transition.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/june_1_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Ch3 id=\"sticker-api-for-messenger-platform\">Sticker API for Messenger Platform\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Use the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/sticker-api\">Sticker API\u003C\/a> to browse, search, and send first-party stickers through the Messenger Platform API.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>New endpoints:\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>GET \/sticker_packs\u003C\/code> \u2014 List available sticker packs with name, description, preview image, and sticker count.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>GET \/sticker_packs\/&lt;STICKER_PACK_ID&gt;\/stickers\u003C\/code> \u2014 List stickers within a specific pack, including id, name, image URL, and dimensions.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>GET \/sticker_search?q=&lt;QUERY&gt;\u003C\/code> \u2014 Search stickers by keyword across all available packs. Supports multilingual search with the \u003Ccode>locale\u003C\/code> parameter using a \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/messenger-profile\/supported-locales\">supported locale\u003C\/a> code (for example, \u003Ccode>locale=vi_VN\u003C\/code> for Vietnamese or \u003Ccode>locale=ko_KR\u003C\/code> for Korean). Defaults to \u003Ccode>en_US\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Send stickers:\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Use the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/\">Send Messages API\u003C\/a> to send a sticker with the \u003Ccode>sticker_id\u003C\/code> field:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cpre>\u003Ccode class=\"language-json\">{\n  \"recipient\": {\"id\": \"&lt;PSID&gt;\"},\n  \"message\": {\"sticker_id\": 767226160478561}\n}\n\u003C\/code>\u003C\/pre>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Webhook change with sticker attachment type (90-day transition):\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Sticker messages in \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/webhooks\/\">webhooks\u003C\/a> now include a new \u003Ccode>type: \"sticker\"\u003C\/code> attachment with \u003Ccode>sticker_id\u003C\/code> metadata, alongside the existing \u003Ccode>type: \"image\"\u003C\/code> attachment. During the 90-day transition period (until August 30, 2026), both attachment types are present in the payload. After the transition, only the \u003Ccode>sticker\u003C\/code> attachment type will be sent.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Update your webhook handlers to recognize the \u003Ccode>sticker\u003C\/code> attachment type before August 30, 2026. The same change applies to message echoes and Conversations API responses.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Required permissions:\u003C\/strong> The catalog and search endpoints require an app access token (no additional permissions). Sending stickers requires \u003Ccode>pages_messaging\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27363666879896841","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1777273200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The legacy \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"share\"]},\" attachment type is being removed from Instagram post share webhook payloads. As announced on \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"#october-30--2025\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"October 30, 2025\"]},\", the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"share\"]},\" attachment has been deprecated in favor of the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"ig_post\"]},\" attachment type, which includes full metadata (media ID, URL, and title). This change is being rolled out gradually: webhooks will return only the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"ig_post\"]},\" attachment once rollout reaches your app. If your integration still relies on the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"share\"]},\" attachment type for Instagram posts, update it to use \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"ig_post\"]},\" instead or contact our developer support team through \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/developers.facebook.com\\\/support\\\/\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Meta Developer Support Portal\"]},\" to request exclusion of your app(s) from this change.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! As announced on \u003Ca href=\"#october-30--2025\">October 30, 2025\u003C\/a>, the \u003Ccode>share\u003C\/code> attachment has been deprecated in favor of the \u003Ccode>ig_post\u003C\/code> attachment type, which includes full metadata (media ID, URL, and title). This change is being rolled out gradually: webhooks will return only the \u003Ccode>ig_post\u003C\/code> attachment once rollout reaches your app. If your integration still relies on the \u003Ccode>share\u003C\/code> attachment type for Instagram posts, update it to use \u003Ccode>ig_post\u003C\/code> instead or contact our developer support team through \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/developers.facebook.com\/support\/\">Meta Developer Support Portal\u003C\/a> to request exclusion of your app(s) from this change.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27216134711313053","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1774594800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Effective April 27, 2026 all API requests containing the deprecated Message Tags CONFIRMED_EVENT_UPDATE, ACCOUNT_UPDATE, and POST_PURCHASE_UPDATE will receive error code 100 indicating deprecated message tags are no longer allowed in API Requests.  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 26, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-03-26\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Post and Reel shares in Messenger now surfaced in Conversations API and Webhooks.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/march_26_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"messenger-post-and-reel-share-data-in-conversations-api-and-webhooks\">Messenger Post and Reel Share Data in Conversations API and Webhooks\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Post and Reel shares sent in Messenger are now surfaced in both the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversations\">Conversations API\u003C\/a> and Webhooks. Partners can access share metadata (such as url, id, type, and title) directly from their own platform without switching to Meta Business Suite.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Conversations API\u003C\/strong> \u2014 Post\/Reel share messages now include type of share (\u003Ccode>post\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>ig_post\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>reel\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>ig_reel\u003C\/code>) with url, title and id\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Messages Webhook\u003C\/strong> \u2014 When a customer sends a post or reel in Messenger, the messages\nwebhook payload includes the share metadata (title, url, id) with the corresponding type (\u003Ccode>post\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>ig_post\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>reel\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>ig_reel\u003C\/code>)\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35568199209461655","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1773385200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The Instagram Direct Send API now supports sending the images with attachment IDs (in addition to image URLs) which resolves the problem of timeouts when uploading multiple large high-quality images from slow servers. You can use the attachment API to upload the images one at a time and reuse the attachment IDs to send the same image to multiple users. See   the updated documentation for \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/send-message\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Facebook Graph API\"]},\" for Instagram accounts linked with a Facebook page OR the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/instagram-platform\\\/instagram-api-with-instagram-login\\\/messaging-api\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Instagram API\"]},\" for Intagram-only accounts.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 13, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-03-13\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Instagram Direct Send API now supports sending images with attachment IDs.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/march_13_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>The Instagram Direct Send API now supports sending the images with attachment IDs (in addition to image URLs) which resolves the problem of timeouts when uploading multiple large high-quality images from slow servers. You can use the attachment API to upload the images one at a time and reuse the attachment IDs to send the same image to multiple users. See   the updated documentation for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/send-message\">Facebook Graph API\u003C\/a> for Instagram accounts linked with a Facebook page OR the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram-platform\/instagram-api-with-instagram-login\/messaging-api\">Instagram API\u003C\/a> for Intagram-only accounts.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26951221587849024","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1772784000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"named-parameters-in-messenger-utility-templates\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Named Parameters in Messenger Utility Templates\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger Utility Templates now support named parameters (e.g., {{customer_name}}, {{order_id}}) in addition to positional parameters ({{1}}, {{2}}). Set parameter_format to NAMED when creating a template and use the parameter_name field when sending messages. Existing templates using positional parameters are unaffected. Detailed steps on how to created templates with named parameters are listed \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/utility-messages#step-1--create-a-page-owned-template\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Set parameter_format to NAMED when creating a template and use the parameter_name field when sending messages. Existing templates using positional parameters are unaffected. Detailed steps on how to created templates with named parameters are listed \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/utility-messages#step-1--create-a-page-owned-template\">here\u003C\/a>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35472629705716862","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1772524800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"messenger-appointment-booking-data-in-conversations-api-and-webhooks\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger Appointment Booking Data in Conversations API and Webhooks\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Appointment booking data from Messenger is now surfaced in the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/conversations\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Conversations API\"]},\" and\\nWebhooks. Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 3, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-03-03\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Appointment booking data from Messenger now available in Conversations API and Webhooks.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/march_3_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"messenger-appointment-booking-data-in-conversations-api-and-webhooks\">Messenger Appointment Booking Data in Conversations API and Webhooks\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Appointment booking data from Messenger is now surfaced in the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversations\">Conversations API\u003C\/a> and\nWebhooks. Partners can access appointment details \u2014 including status, scheduled time, and timezone \u2014 directly from their own platform without switching to Meta\nBusiness Suite.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Conversations API\u003C\/strong> \u2014 Appointment messages now include an \u003Ccode>appointment_booking\u003C\/code> attachment with status, start\/end times, and timezone when fetching\nconversation messages.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Messages Webhook\u003C\/strong> \u2014 When a customer sends an appointment booking request, the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/messages#message-with-appointment-booking\">messages\nwebhook\u003C\/a> payload includes the appointment data as an attachment with type\n\u003Ccode>appointment_booking\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Message Echoes Webhook\u003C\/strong> \u2014 When a business responds to an appointment (e.g., confirming or declining), the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/message-echoes#appointment\">message_echoes\nwebhook\u003C\/a> payload includes the updated appointment data.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35436463662635221","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1770796800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"messenger-calling-api--general-availability\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"February 11, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-02-11\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Messenger Calling API is now generally available with call settings, permissions, metrics, and ad referral webhooks.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/february_11_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"messenger-calling-api--general-availability\">Messenger Calling API \u2014 General Availability\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>The Messenger Calling API is now generally available. Any app with the pages_messaging permission can enable voice calling between businesses and people on Messenger via third-party integration. The API supports inbound and outbound calls using WebRTC and includes:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Call settings webhook \u2014 Receive real-time updates when a Page\u2019s Messenger call settings change\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Call permissions API \u2014 Programmatically check a Page\u2019s call permissions and rate limits before placing a call\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Call metrics API \u2014 Submit client-side call quality metrics for monitoring and diagnostics\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Audio call button CTA \u2014 Use the audio_call button type in generic and button message templates to prompt users to call\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Ad referral webhooks \u2014 Receive ad attribution data for calls originating from Call Prompt Ads\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>See the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/calling\">Messenger Calling API documentation\u003C\/a> for integration details.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27209294815333317","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1769760000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"page-integrity-api\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Page This include the integrity status, violations, restrictions, recommended actions (e.g. file an appeal) and appeal Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"December 19, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-12-19\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Instagram PDF attachments and Instagram Message Replies API now available.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/december_19_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"instagram-pdf-attachments\">Instagram PDF Attachments\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>You can now upload and send PDF file attachment in Instagram Direct using \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/send-message\">Facebook Graph API\u003C\/a> for Instagram accounts linked with a Facebook page OR the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram-platform\/instagram-api-with-instagram-login\/messaging-api\">Instagram API\u003C\/a> for Instagram-only accounts.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"instagram-message-replies-api\">Instagram Message Replies API\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>You can now send a reply to a specific  message in Instagram Direct using the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/send-message#send-a-reply-to-a-message\">Facebook Graph API\u003C\/a> for Instagram accounts linked with a Facebook page\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ccode>reply_to\u003C\/code> object will also be available in the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversations\">Conversations API\u003C\/a>. It will be non-null when the message is a reply and will indicate if it is a self reply.  This boolean flag will also be added to the reply_to object returned in the message object in Message and Echo webhooks.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27077641951865925","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1764662400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Businesses can now use the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/sender-actions\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/instagram-platform\\\/instagram-api-with-instagram-login\\\/messaging-api#react-or-unreact-to-a-message\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Instagram Send API\"]},\" to react with a reaction emoji to a message in their inbox, edit an existing reaction on a message and remove a reaction (unreact) from a message that was previously reacted to.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/sender-actions\">Messenger\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram-platform\/instagram-api-with-instagram-login\/messaging-api#react-or-unreact-to-a-message\">Instagram Send API\u003C\/a> to react with a reaction emoji to a message in their Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 3, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-11-03\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Multi-image sending now available in Instagram Direct (Beta).\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/november_3_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>You can now send a collection of images in Instagram Direct using either the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/send-message\">Facebook Graph API\u003C\/a> for Instagram accounts linked with a Facebook page OR the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram-platform\/instagram-api-with-instagram-login\/messaging-api\">Instagram API\u003C\/a> for Intagram-only accounts.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Coc-devui-note color=\"warning\">\n  \u003Cp>November 3, 2025: Multi-image sending is a Beta feature that will be rolled out incrementally over a few weeks . While the feature is rolled out, some Instagram accounts may get an error response \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/send-message#send-images\">\u003Ccode>2534068\u003C\/code>\u003C\/a> to indicate that the feature is not yet available for that account.\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/oc-devui-note>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26922310814057055","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1761807600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Starting November 3, 2025, the webhook payload for Instagram post shares will include two attachments: the existing \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"share\"]},\" attachment and a new \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"ig_post\"]},\" attachment. The payload now provides additional metadata, including media ID, URL, and title (caption).\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"If this change is not compatible with your app and you need more time to make updates, please contact our developer support team via the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/developers.facebook.com\\\/support\\\/\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Meta Developer Support Portal\"]},\" to request exclusion of your app(s) from this change until you make the necessary updates to support the new attachment type.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The old \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"share\"]},\" attachment type will continue to be supported for Instagram posts until \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"February 1, 2026\"]},\", after which it will be removed. Partners and integrators are encouraged to migrate to the new \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"ig_post\"]},\" attachment type as soon as possible. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/instagram-platform\\\/webhooks\\\/new\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\" for before and after payload sample.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 30, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-10-30\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Instagram post share webhooks now include new ig_post attachment type with metadata.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/october_30_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>Starting November 3, 2025, the webhook payload for Instagram post shares will include two attachments: the existing \u003Ccode>share\u003C\/code> attachment and a new \u003Ccode>ig_post\u003C\/code> attachment. The payload now provides additional metadata, including media ID, URL, and title (caption).\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>If this change is not compatible with your app and you need more time to make updates, please contact our developer support team via the \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/developers.facebook.com\/support\/\">Meta Developer Support Portal\u003C\/a> to request exclusion of your app(s) from this change until you make the necessary updates to support the new attachment type.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The old \u003Ccode>share\u003C\/code> attachment type will continue to be supported for Instagram posts until \u003Cstrong>February 1, 2026\u003C\/strong>, after which it will be removed. Partners and integrators are encouraged to migrate to the new \u003Ccode>ig_post\u003C\/code> attachment type as soon as possible. See \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram-platform\/webhooks\/new\">here\u003C\/a> for before and after payload sample.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26696948649964776","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1761548400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"AI generated stickers are now included in the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/conversations\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger Conversations API\"]},\" response when the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"shares\"]},\" message \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/graph-api\\\/reference\\\/v24.0\\\/message#readfields\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"field\"]},\" is specified. The response provides both the stickerID and url for the AI generated sticker in the message.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! The response provides both the stickerID and url for the AI generated sticker in the message.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26681988818124400","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1761202800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Meta no longer supports the Handover Protocol for Instagram. Conversation Routing is backwards compatible with most Handover Protocol APIs and functionalities, and is expected to function without interruption.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! All businesses have been migrated to \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/conversation-routing\">Conversation Routing\u003C\/a>. Conversation Routing is backwards compatible with most Handover Protocol APIs and functionalities, and is expected to function without interruption.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25314553508243157","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1761030000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/moderate-conversations\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Instagram Moderate Conversations API\"]},\" is now available.\\nThis new API will allow businesses to block users, unblock users, and move conversations to the spam folder in Meta Business Suite Inbox for the Instagram platform. Previously, these actions could only be completed on the Instagram app or Meta Business Suite.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27653160637609063","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1760338800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/conversations#conversation-ownership-filtering\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Conversations API\"]},\" now supports an \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"is_owner\"]},\" field for both Messenger and Instagram. This field indicates if the app making the request is the current thread owner of the conversation or not, and is only returned when \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/conversation-routing\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Conversation Routing\"]},\" is enabled.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Benefits:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonOl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Filter and respond only to conversations your app owns.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Avoid unnecessary ticket creation and reduce costs.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Streamline recovery after downtime by focusing on relevant threads.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonOl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonOl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 13, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-10-13\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Conversations API now supports is_owner field for Messenger and Instagram thread ownership filtering.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/october_13_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>The \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversations#conversation-ownership-filtering\">Conversations API\u003C\/a> now supports an \u003Ccode>is_owner\u003C\/code> field for both Messenger and Instagram. This field indicates if the app making the request is the current thread owner of the conversation or not, and is only returned when \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversation-routing\">Conversation Routing\u003C\/a> is enabled.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Benefits:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Col>\n  \u003Cli>Filter and respond only to conversations your app owns.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Avoid unnecessary ticket creation and reduce costs.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Streamline recovery after downtime by focusing on relevant threads.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ol>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27046746641629233","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1759734000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"reply_to\"]},\" is now available in the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/conversations\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Conversations API\"]},\". It will be non-null when a message is a reply and will indicate if it is a self reply.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"In addition to \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"mid\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"text\"]},\", the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"reply_to\"]},\" object will also be returned in the message object in \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/webhook-events\\\/messages\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Message\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/webhook-events\\\/message-echoes\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Echo\"]},\" webhooks. The \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"reply_to\"]},\" object will be populated with the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"mid\"]},\" that the message is replying to and will contain a boolean field \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"is_self_reply\"]},\" that indicates whether the message is a self reply or just a reply.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 6, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-10-06\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"reply_to field now available in Conversations API and Message\/Echo webhooks.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/october_6_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ccode>reply_to\u003C\/code> is now available in the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversations\">Conversations API\u003C\/a>. It will be non-null when a message is a reply and will indicate if it is a self reply.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>In addition to \u003Ccode>mid\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>text\u003C\/code>, the \u003Ccode>reply_to\u003C\/code> object will also be returned in the message object in \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/messages\">Message\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/message-echoes\">Echo\u003C\/a> webhooks. The \u003Ccode>reply_to\u003C\/code> object will be populated with the \u003Ccode>mid\u003C\/code> that the message is replying to and will contain a boolean field \u003Ccode>is_self_reply\u003C\/code> that indicates whether the message is a self reply or just a reply.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27495367483393820","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1759129200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Launching image support for \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/utility-messages#step-1--create-a-page-owned-template\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Utility Messages\"]},\" in Messenger. You can now send images with Utility Message templates.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! You can now send images with Utility Message templates.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26581533348196206","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1758610800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Businesses can now display typing indicators and mark_seen indicators in a conversation to let message recipients know that the business has seen and are processing their message, using \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/sender-actions\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Sender Actions\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! This is available in the ad referral object of the \u003Ccode>messages\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>messaging_postbacks\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>messaging_referrals\u003C\/code> webhooks. See more details about the webhook \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/messaging_referrals\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27292580983683516","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1728370800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"messenger-response_feedback-webhook\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"response_feedback\"]},\" webhook\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The new \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"response_feedback\"]},\" webhook event notifies you when a user provides feedback on a message you send, by clicking on one of the \\u201cthumbs up\\u201d\\\/\\u201dthumbs down\\u201d\\\/\\u201dGood response\\u201d\\\/\\u201dBad response\\u201d buttons. See more details about the webhook \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/webhook-events\\\/response_feedback\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"send-api-rate-limits\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Send API Rate Limits\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Your app can now make 300 (up from 100) calls per second per Instagram professional account for messages that contain text, links, reactions, and stickers. \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/overview#rate-limiting\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Learn more.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! See more details about the webhook \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/response_feedback\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"send-api-rate-limits\">Send API Rate Limits\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Your app can now make 300 (up from 100) calls per second per Instagram professional account for messages that contain text, links, reactions, and stickers. \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/overview#rate-limiting\">Learn more.\u003C\/a>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27173876225582030","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1719126000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"launch-of-the-new-instagram-api-with-instagram-login\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Launch Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 23, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-06-23\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"New Instagram API with Instagram Login launched, removing Facebook Page requirement.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/june_23_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"launch-of-the-new-instagram-api-with-instagram-login\">Launch of the new Instagram API with Instagram Login\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram\/platform\/instagram-api\/overview\">Components of this new Instagram API:\u003C\/a>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>A Facebook Page will no longer be required\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>The host URL for API calls is \u003Ccode>graph.instagram.com\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>New permissions for this API:\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>instagram_business_basic\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>instagram_business_content_publishing\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>instagram_business_manage_comments\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>instagram_business_manage_messages\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>New apps will add the new \u003Cstrong>Instagram\u003C\/strong> product when creating a Meta app\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Existing apps can add the new \u003Cstrong>Instagram\u003C\/strong> product in the App Dashboard\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram\/platform\/instagram-api\/migration-guide\">Visit our migration guide to learn if this new Instagram API with Instagram Login is right for you\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Monitor the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram-api\/changelog\">Instagram Platform Changelog\u003C\/a> for changes including bug fixes and new For more information, refer to \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/instagram-api\\\/guides\\\/webhooks\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Set Up Webhooks for Instagram\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 11, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-06-11\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"ig_reel webhook support, app-level thread control configs, and Instagram Comment Webhook updates.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/june_11_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Ch3 id=\"messenger-messages-webhook\">Messenger Messages Webhook\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ccode>ig_reel\u003C\/code> will now be a supported attachment type for the messages webhook. IG reel attachments will have type \u003Ccode>ig_reel\u003C\/code> and the attachment payload will include the title, url, and video id for the reel.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"instagram-messages-webhook\">Instagram Messages Webhook\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ccode>ig_reel\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>reel\u003C\/code> will now be supported attachment types in a messages webhook. IG reel attachments will have type \u003Ccode>ig_reel\u003C\/code>, and the attachment payload will include the title, url, and video id for the reel. FB reel attachments will have type \u003Ccode>reel\u003C\/code>, and the attachment payload will include the title, url, and video id for the reel.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"messenger-conversation-routing-app-level-thread-control-configs\">Messenger Conversation Routing: app-level thread control configs\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Businesses using Messenger Conversation Routing can now configure the thread control takeover capability on the individual app level. The original takeover config that\u2019s coupled with the default app is now deprecated with all values migrated. Learn more \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversation-routing?locale=en_US#tc-takeover-configs\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"instagram-comment-webhooks\">Instagram Comment Webhooks\u003C\/h3>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Applies to all versions\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>In addition to the \u003Ccode>ad_id\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>ad_title\u003C\/code>, the \u003Ccode>original_media_id\u003C\/code> will be returned in the \u003Ccode>media\u003C\/code> object of the \u003Ccode>comments\u003C\/code> field\u2019s \u003Ccode>value\u003C\/code> object when a person comments on a \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/help.instagram.com\/1067656009937668\">boosted Instagram post or Instagram ads post\u003C\/a>. For more information, refer to \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram-api\/guides\/webhooks\">Set Up Webhooks for Instagram\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27484066784524408","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1712646000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"message_edits-webhook-event\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"message_edits\"]},\" Webhook Event\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The new \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"message_edits\"]},\" webhook event notifies you when a user edits a previously-sent message. Learn more about this webhook event \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/webhook-events\\\/message-edits\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 9, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-04-09\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"New message_edits webhook event for user-edited messages.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/april_9_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Ch3 id=\"message_edits-webhook-event\">\u003Ccode>message_edits\u003C\/code> Webhook Event\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>The new \u003Ccode>message_edits\u003C\/code> webhook event notifies you when a user edits a previously-sent message. Learn more about this webhook event \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/message-edits\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26406170702418900","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1710226800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"welcome-message-flows\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Welcome Message Flows\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Welcome Message flows can now be configured for messaging ads using the marketing API. Reel attachments will be categorized as type \u003Ccode>reel\u003C\/code> and the attachment payload will include the title, URL, and video ID of the reel.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27133007616331689","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1704873600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"commands\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Commands\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Commands are tappable keywords that the user can invoke at any time to perform specific actions within the Messenger experience.
