Note that if you are planning to fetch user profile information, you still need to go through app review for the permissions required for accessing the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/messenger-profile-api\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"User Profile API\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"January 10, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-01-10\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Commands, commands menu, share sheet, business profile updates, welcome screen improvements, and app review changes.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/january_10_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Ch3 id=\"commands\">Commands\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Commands are tappable keywords that the user can invoke at any time to perform specific actions within the Messenger experience. Commands are composed of the command itself and a hint, which educates the user on what it does. For example, when a user types \u201chelp me book \u003Cstrong>flights\u003C\/strong> and \u003Cstrong>hotels\u003C\/strong> to Mexico for the last week of december,\u201d they are invoking the flights and hotels commands configured by the travel business. Learn more \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/messenger-profile-api\/commands\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"commands-menu\">Commands menu\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>The commands menu is a new menu that we are introducing that will automatically appear when you set up commands. If you already have a persistent menu set for your Messenger experience, the commands menu will override it. Learn more \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/messenger-profile-api\/commands\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"share-sheet\">Share sheet\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>People can now share your messaging experience from the business profile page on Messenger. This helps drive word-of-mouth discovery of your Messenger experience. Learn more \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/discovery\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"business-profile-updates\">Business profile updates\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Commands will appear on the business profile once you configure the commands for your Messenger experience. People can navigate to the business profile by tapping on the page name at the top and learn about the commands you have made available in your Messenger experience.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"welcome-screen-update\">Welcome screen update\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>The welcome screen shows the list of commands supported by the messaging experience, making it easy for people to understand what actions the Messenger experience can perform. Learn more \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/discovery\/welcome-screen\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"messenger-app-review-update\">Messenger app review update\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>If you are developing the app to send and receive messages for your own page, you will not have to go through app review. Note that if you are planning to fetch user profile information, you still need to go through app review for the permissions required for accessing the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/messenger-profile-api\">User Profile API\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26961233056822768","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1697526000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"conversation-routing-for-instagram\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Conversation Routing for Instagram\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Conversation Routing is now available for Instagram. Conversation Routing allows Meta to route conversations between your business and customers, or prospective customers, to the app that you have specified to respond in the conversation. This routing allows your business to create rich conversations with people and to minimize API calls to Meta\\u2019s servers.\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"custom-labels-and-personas-apis\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Custom Labels and Personas APIs\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The Custom Labels API and Personas API access has been restored to businesses that operate in Europe, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally.\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"updates-to-welcome-message-flows-for-ads-that-click-to-messenger-and-instagram-direct\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Updates to welcome message flows for Ads that Click to Messenger and Instagram Direct\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Businesses and agencies can now easily connect their Click to Messenger and Click to Instagram Direct ads to a welcome message created in a partner app without having to use a JSON code snippet. The welcome message will appear as a dropdown in ads manager when creating the Click to Messenger and Click to Instagram Direct ad. \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/ads\\\/ads-welcome-message-flows\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Learn more about it here.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 17, 2023\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2023-10-17\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Conversation Routing for Instagram, Custom Labels and Personas API restored for Europe, and welcome message flow updates.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/october_17_2023.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Ch3 id=\"conversation-routing-for-instagram\">Conversation Routing for Instagram\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Conversation Routing is now available for Instagram. Conversation Routing allows Meta to route conversations between your business and customers, or prospective customers, to the app that you have specified to respond in the conversation. This routing allows your business to create rich conversations with people and to minimize API calls to Meta\u2019s servers.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"custom-labels-and-personas-apis\">Custom Labels and Personas APIs\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>The Custom Labels API and Personas API access has been restored to businesses that operate in Europe, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"updates-to-welcome-message-flows-for-ads-that-click-to-messenger-and-instagram-direct\">Updates to welcome message flows for Ads that Click to Messenger and Instagram Direct\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>Businesses and agencies can now easily connect their Click to Messenger and Click to Instagram Direct ads to a welcome message created in a partner app without having to use a JSON code snippet. The welcome message will appear as a dropdown in ads manager when creating the Click to Messenger and Click to Instagram Direct ad. \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/ads\/ads-welcome-message-flows\">Learn more about it here.\u003C\/a>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26939220322383879","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1697094000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"private-replies\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Private Replies\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Private Reply is now available for comments on Facebook Reels.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"from\"]},\" field and parent context via Conversation routing lets you define which partners control customer conversations at a particular time, so that customers get the information they need. You can create and manage message routing rules in your Page settings.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch3 id=\"button-template-for-instagram\">Button Template for Instagram\u003C\/h3>\n\n\u003Cp>The button template sends a text message with up to three attached buttons. This template is useful for offering the message recipient options to choose from, such as predetermined responses to a question, or actions to take. Supported button types are \u003Ccode>postback\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>web_url\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26154868214192930","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1690354800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH3\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"lead-ads-for-messenger\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Lead Ads for Messenger\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Instant Form Message Template\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH3"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! If \u003Ccode>title\u003C\/code> is not set, the value defaults to \u201cUpdates and promotions\u201d. This change applies to opt in requests sent from a Facebook Page or Instagram Professional accounts.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26533080073000013","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1675324800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nRecurring Notifications for Messenger Platform\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"message-frequency-for-opt-in-requests\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Message Frequency for Opt In Requests\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonDiv\",\"props\":{\"style\":\"padding:5px\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"notification_messages_frequency\"]},\" property for \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/recurring-notifications\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"recurring notification opt in requests\"]},\" is \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"deprecated\"]},\" and will no longer be returned in \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"GET\"]},\" requests or webhook notifications.  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"February 2, 2023\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2023-02-02\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Recurring notifications frequency deprecated, followup messages added, and GIF support for Instagram.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/february_2_2023.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp style=\"font-size:18px\">\nRecurring Notifications for Messenger Platform\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"message-frequency-for-opt-in-requests\">Message Frequency for Opt In Requests\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cdiv style=\"padding:5px\"\/>\n\n\u003Cp>The \u003Ccode>notification_messages_frequency\u003C\/code> property for \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/recurring-notifications\">recurring notification opt in requests\u003C\/a> is \u003Cstrong>deprecated\u003C\/strong> and will no longer be returned in \u003Ccode>GET\u003C\/code> requests or webhook notifications. However, notification message tokens created before Feb. 2, 2023 for weekly or monthly recurring notifications will be supported and the \u003Ccode>notification_message_frequency\u003C\/code> will be returned in webhook notifications.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"followup-messages-for-opt-ins\">Followup Messages for Opt Ins\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>You can now send up to three \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/recurring-notifications#opt-in-followup-messages\">followup messages\u003C\/a> to a person who has opted in to receiving recurring notifications. All three followup messages must be sent within 2 minutes of the first followup message.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"notification-message-tokens\">Notification Message Tokens\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cdiv style=\"padding:5px\"\/>\n\n\u003Cp>The \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/recurring-notifications#get-a-list-of-tokens\">\u003Ccode>GET \/PAGE-ID\/notification_message_tokens\u003C\/code> endpoint\u003C\/a> is now available for Instagram Messaging.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/recurring-notifications#get-a-list-of-tokens\">\u003Ccode>next_eligible_time\u003C\/code> property\u003C\/a> for Notification Message Token endpoints is now available. This field returns the time at which you are able to send the next recurring notification using that notification message token.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp style=\"font-size:18px\">\nMessenger API for Instagram\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>You can now send GIFs in \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/send-message\">messages sent\u003C\/a> from an Instagram Professional account using the Messenger API for Instagram.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/instagram\/features\/upload-attachment\">Attachment Upload API\u003C\/a> now supports uploading media for messages sent from an Instagram Professional account.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C!-- T143014448 -->\n\n\u003Cp>Referral information for ads that click to an Instagram conversation (CTD) is now returned in \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/webhooks#messages\">messages webhook notifications\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26417151241314877","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1672646400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"messenger-platform-insights\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger Platform Insights\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Beginning March, 31, 2023, you will no longer be able to download a CVS file from the Messenger Insights\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>Beginning March, 31, 2023, you will no longer be able to download a CVS file from the Messenger Analytics dashboard. \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/analytics\/messaging-insights\">Visit the Messaging Insights API\u003C\/a> to learn how to get these steps.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"improvements-between-click-to-messenger-lead-gen-ads-and-messenger-platform\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Improvements Click to Messenger easier through:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"A new \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/discovery\\\/lead-generation-ads-in-messenger#webhooks\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Referral Advertisers can now select which app they want to route completed leads. Businesses can use this event to report lead submissions from Click to Messenger ads. This new messaging event is released as an Open Beta. You may need to update your webhooks server to handle these new fields.\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"recurring-notifications\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Recurring Notifications\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"You can now get a list of all valid Notification Message Tokens using the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/recurring-notifications#get-a-list-of-tokens\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"GET \\\/PAGE-ID\\\/notification_message_tokens\"]},\" endpoint\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 9, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-11-09\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Business Login for Instagram, Lead Gen ads improvements, Messaging Events API, Persistent Menu and Private Replies for Instagram.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/november_9_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"biz-login\">Business Login for Instagram\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram\/business-login-for-instagram\">Business Login for Instagram\u003C\/a> makes it easier for you to onboard Instagram users who still need to configure their account for API access through modal pop ups and fewer steps.\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"improvements-between-click-to-messenger-lead-gen-ads-and-messenger-platform\">Improvements between Click to Messenger, Lead Gen ads and Messenger Platform\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>We\u2019ve made following up on Lead Gen ads that Click to Messenger easier through:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>A new \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/discovery\/lead-generation-ads-in-messenger#webhooks\">Referral Webhook for  Click to Messenger, Lead Gen ads\u003C\/a> that include the lead information.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Improvements to the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol\/messenger-lead-ads-hop\">Handover Protocol\u003C\/a>. Advertisers can now select which app they want to route completed leads. Additionally, for apps that haven\u2019t yet implemented these app notifications, an \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/discovery\/lead-generation-ads-in-messenger#connnectapp\">optional summary message\u003C\/a> can be enabled, to send lead information to that app in the form of a regular message.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Since referral or summary events are triggered while the standard messaging window is open, apps can use this to follow-up with leads directly in Messenger, upsell them to \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/recurring-notifications\">Recurring Notifications\u003C\/a> or have them book an appointment or call the business directly.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"messaging-events-api\">Messaging Events API\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>Messaging Events API supports the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/ads-commerce\/conversions-api\/business-messaging#lead_submitted\">\u003Ccode>lead_submitted\u003C\/code> event\u003C\/a>. Businesses can use this event to report lead submissions from Click to Messenger ads. This new messaging event is released as an Open Beta. Reporting in Ads Manager will come soon.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"persistent-menu\">Persistent Menu\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/persistent-menu\">Persistent Menu\u003C\/a> is now available for Instagram Messaging.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"private-replies\">Private Replies\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>Instagram Messaging now supports \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/private-replies\">Private Replies\u003C\/a> for comments on Instagram Live Stories and ads posts. You may need to update your webhooks server to handle these new fields.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"recurring-notifications\">Recurring Notifications\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>You can now get a list of all valid Notification Message Tokens using the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/recurring-notifications#get-a-list-of-tokens\">\u003Ccode>GET \/PAGE-ID\/notification_message_tokens\u003C\/code> endpoint\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"37033450832934809","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1665990000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"recurring-notifications\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Recurring Notifications\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"App IDs will no longer be associated with notification message tokens. All apps linked to a Page will now receive opt in webhook notifications when a person has opted in to receive recurring Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 17, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-10-17\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Recurring notification tokens decoupled from app IDs, new opt-in fields, carousel support, and additional opt-in methods.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/october_17_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"recurring-notifications\">Recurring Notifications\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cp>App IDs will no longer be associated with notification message tokens. All apps linked to a Page will now receive opt in webhook notifications when a person has opted in to receive recurring notifications.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The following \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/recurring-notifications\">message attachment payload fields\u003C\/a> have been added:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>image_aspect_ratio\u003C\/code> \u2013 Set an image to a horizontal or square aspect ratio for opt in requests\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>elements\u003C\/code> \u2013 Create a carousel of images for opt in requests\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>notification_message_tokens\u003C\/code> \u2013 Get a list of current notifications message tokens\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>notification_messages_cta_text\u003C\/code> \u2013 Customize the text for call to actions for opt in requests\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>The following ways to get opt ins for recurring notifications have been added:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/discovery#recurring-notification-opt-in-requests\">Chat Plugin\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/discovery\">Checkbox Plugin\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/discovery\/m-me-links#recurring-notifications-opt-in-requests\">\u003Ccode>m.me\u003C\/code> links\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27010800811939829","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1664780400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"May 19, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-05-19\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Recurring Notifications for Messenger and Instagram, Send API rate limit increase, ig.me referral parameter, and new onboarding flow.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/may_19_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cb>Recurring Notifications for Messenger API\u003C\/b> \u003Cbr\/> \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/recurring-notifications\">Recurring Notifications\u003C\/a> is a major update to the Messenger API to allow businesses to send proactive, automated messages that drive re-engagement. Recurring Notifications help businesses deliver personalized, customer centric messages at every stage of the customer journey.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cb>Recurring Notifications for Messenger API for Instagram\u003C\/b> \u003Cbr\/> We\u2019re announcing Recurring Notifications for Messenger API for Instagram as a beta. Developers can sign up for our \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/www.facebook.com\/help\/contact\/528956182103351\">beta interest list\u003C\/a> before July.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cb>Instagram Send API rate limit increase \u003C\/b> \u003Cbr\/> We have increased the rate limit for the Send API to 100 API calls per second for each Instagram Professional Account.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cb>ig.me referral parameter\u003C\/b> \u003Cbr\/> Businesses can add \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/ig-me-links\">ig.me links\u003C\/a> on  websites, emails, and product packaging to easily enable users to start a conversation with a business on Instagram. We are adding the ability for brands to add a \u003Cstrong>referral parameter\u003C\/strong> to these ig.me links to create personalized messaging experiences.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cb>Instagram API New Onboarding Flow\u003C\/b> \u003Cbr\/> We are announcing a \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram\/business-login-for-instagram\">new onboarding flow for the Instagram API\u003C\/a> as a beta. Developers can sign up for our beta interest list before June 29.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26930196119967167","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1650351600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Ice Breakers on Messenger API now \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/messenger-profile-api\\\/ice-breakers\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"supports localization\"]},\" allowing businesses to set custom ice breakers depending on the user locale. The API will have a new format and we encourage developers to leverage the new format to set and retrieve Ice Breakers information.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger apps which haven\\u2019t completed \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/development\\\/release\\\/business-verification\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"business verification\"]},\" must complete verification by \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"July 19, 2022\"]},\". If apps don\\u2019t complete business verification by then, they won\\u2019t be able to send and receive messages via Messenger and pages_messaging permission for these apps will be revoked. \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Developer alerts have been sent to the impacted apps. If you have already completed business verification for your Messenger app no further action is needed.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We have restored \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/europe-japan-updates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"message reads, deliveries and reactions webhooks\"]},\" on Messenger Platform that weren\\u2019t available to businesses in Europe, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 19, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-04-19\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Ice Breakers localization, business verification deadline, and restored webhooks for Europe and Japan.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/april_19_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Ice Breakers on Messenger API now \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/messenger-profile-api\/ice-breakers\">supports localization\u003C\/a> allowing businesses to set custom ice breakers depending on the user locale. The API will have a new format and we encourage developers to leverage the new format to set and retrieve Ice Breakers information.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Messenger apps which haven\u2019t completed \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/development\/release\/business-verification\">business verification\u003C\/a> must complete verification by \u003Cstrong>July 19, 2022\u003C\/strong>. If apps don\u2019t complete business verification by then, they won\u2019t be able to send and receive messages via Messenger and pages_messaging permission for these apps will be revoked. \u003Cstrong>Developer alerts have been sent to the impacted apps. If you have already completed business verification for your Messenger app no further action is needed.\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>We have restored \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/europe-japan-updates\">message reads, deliveries and reactions webhooks\u003C\/a> on Messenger Platform that weren\u2019t available to businesses in Europe, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27996441919955935","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1647327600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We have launched the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/persistent-menu\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Persistent Menu for Messenger API support for Instagram\"]},\". Here\\u2019s a summary of key improvements that were announced previously.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We are making improvements to \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/handover-protocol\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Handover Protocol\"]},\" which helps developers and businesses launch messaging experiences (i.e. apps) quickly, makes it easy to pass control of conversation between apps and ensures a great user experience by disallowing apps from interjecting ongoing conversations. Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 14, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-03-14\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Handover Protocol migration completed with Exclusive mode, Idle mode, and new thread ownership APIs.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/march_14_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>As per the announcement on September 14, 2021, all Facebook pages will now be migrated to support the new Handover Protocol behavior. We expect to have all Pages migrated by March 18, 2022. Please refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol#breaking-changes\">breaking changes section\u003C\/a> for more details. Here\u2019s a summary of key improvements that were announced previously.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We are making improvements to \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol\">Handover Protocol\u003C\/a> which helps developers and businesses launch messaging experiences (i.e. apps) quickly, makes it easy to pass control of conversation between apps and ensures a great user experience by disallowing apps from interjecting ongoing conversations. Key improvements include \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol#exclusive-mode\">Exclusive mode\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol#idle-mode\">Idle mode\u003C\/a>, New APIs for finer control over \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol#app-type\">thread ownership\u003C\/a> and removing the requirement to assign \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol#default\">primary or secondary roles for apps\u003C\/a>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27208665835425066","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1644220800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We have launched the Chat Plugin Entrypoint customization settings through API as well as our first party setup tool. This will provide businesses with the option to choose the entry point icon and its label from a set of presets that best fits their branding. For more details please see our \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/discovery#customization\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"developer documentation\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! This will provide businesses with the option to choose the entry point icon and its label from a set of presets that best fits their branding. Please refer to the developer documentation for more details on new fields.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Starting support for \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/ig-me-links\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"IG.me link\"]},\", a shortened URL service that directs users to messaging experience on Instagram. Developers can use the link format \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"https:\\\/\\\/ig.me\\\/m\\\/{ig_profile_handle}\"]},\" on website, email, and more. Please refer to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/ig-me-links\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"developer documentation\"]},\" for more details.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We have made updates to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/ice-breakers\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Ice Breaker\"]},\" on Instagram to support multiple versions in different languages. Developers can now set up Ice Breakers in different languages and serve the right version to users based on user locale. Please refer to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/ice-breakers\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"developer documentation\"]},\" for more details.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 20, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-10-20\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"IG comments webhook and API updates, IG.me link support, and Ice Breaker localization for Instagram.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/october_20_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp style=\"font-size:15px\"\/>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>IG comments \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/graph-api\/webhooks\/reference\/instagram#comments\">webhook\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/instagram-api\/reference\/ig-comment\">API\u003C\/a> are updated with additional fields. Please refer to the developer documentation for more details on new fields.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Starting support for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/ig-me-links\">IG.me link\u003C\/a>, a shortened URL service that directs users to messaging experience on Instagram. Developers can use the link format \u003Ccode>https:\/\/ig.me\/m\/{ig_profile_handle}\u003C\/code> on website, email, and more. Please refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/ig-me-links\">developer documentation\u003C\/a> for more details.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>We have made updates to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/ice-breakers\">Ice Breaker\u003C\/a> on Instagram to support multiple versions in different languages. Developers can now set up Ice Breakers in different languages and serve the right version to users based on user locale. Please refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/ice-breakers\">developer documentation\u003C\/a> for more details.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35381306678183730","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1631602800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Handover Protocol Improvements\\n    \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We are making improvements to \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/handover-protocol\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Handover Protocol\"]},\" which helps developers and businesses launch messaging experiences (i.e. apps) quickly, makes it easy to pass control of conversation between apps and ensures a great user experience by disallowing apps from interjecting ongoing conversations. Key improvements include \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/handover-protocol#how-it-works\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Exclusive mode\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/handover-protocol#how-it-works\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Idle mode\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/handover-protocol\\\/conversation-control\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"New APIs for finer control over thread ownership\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/handover-protocol#how-it-works\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"removing the requirement to assign primary or secondary roles for apps\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Note that developers and businesses who currently use Handover Protocol need to implement the changes to their current Handover Protocol implementation by March 1st, 2022. Please refer to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/handover-protocol-v2#migration-guide\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"migration guide\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/handover-protocol-v2#breaking-changes\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"breaking changes\"]},\" sections for more details.\"]}]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Custom Labels API - We are making exciting updates to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/identity\\\/custom-labels\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Custom Labels API\"]},\" that would allow businesses to create, update and delete labels and sync the labels between the Facebook Page Inbox and any other tool the business might be using to communicate with their customers.\\n    \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonOl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"In order to use the Custom Labels API after October 1st, 2021 businesses need to accept our new \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Page Contact Terms.\"]},\" These terms describe Meta\\u2019s data practices for the Custom Labels created by the business. We will be rolling out the Page Contact Terms acceptance requirement to Facebook Pages on a rolling basis starting October 1st.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Graph API \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v12.0\"]},\"+ Custom Labels API \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"name\"]},\" field will be replaced with \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"page_label_name\"]},\". This change will take effect on all older Graph API versions starting Dec 14, 2021. Developer should leverage \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"page_label_name\"]},\" across various CRUD (Create, Retrieve, Update, Delete) API calls and webhooks.\"]}]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/europe-japan-updates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API Updates for Europe and Japan\"]},\" - We have restored \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/templates\\\/customer-feedback-template\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Customer Feedback Template\"]},\" in the Messenger API that wasn\\u2019t available to businesses in Europe, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally. Details \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/europe-japan-updates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\".\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API for Instagram updates\\n    \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/webhooks\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Reaction Webhook\"]},\" - We have updated emoji reactions to return a new unicode format and support multiple emoji reactions. Please refer to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/webhooks\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"developer documentation\"]},\" and migrate to the new version before December 14, 2021 in order to continue supporting emoji reactions.\"]}]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/user-profile\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"User Profile API\"]},\" - We have updated User Profile API to include additional fields that are publicly available on the Instagram app. Please refer to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/features\\\/user-profile\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"developer documentation\"]},\" for details.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"IGID Deprecation - \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/conversations\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Conversation API\"]},\" will no longer return \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"IGID\"]},\" field and fully rely on \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"IGSID\"]},\" field. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/conversations\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"developer documentation\"]},\" for details in order to migrate before December 14, 2021.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/discovery\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Facebook Chat Plugin Customization API\"]},\" - We are launching Chat Plugin customization settings through API.  With this new release, developers will be able to edit features including the position, color, greetings, guest mode settings, etc. that are currently only available using our first-party tools today.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/webhook-events\\\/message-echoes\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Message Echo webhook\"]},\" will now include the app id for Facebook Page Inbox as part of Graph API \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v12.0\"]},\" - When a business responds to a Messenger conversation from Facebook Page Inbox, other apps connected to the Page can listen to the Message Echo webhook. These apps will receive an echo webhook with the Facebook Page inbox app id (\",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"263902037430900\"]},\").\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonOl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonOl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"September 14, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-09-14\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Handover Protocol improvements, Custom Labels API updates, feature restorations for Europe and Japan, and Instagram API updates.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/september_14_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp style=\"font-size:15px\"\/>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Handover Protocol Improvements\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>We are making improvements to \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol\">Handover Protocol\u003C\/a> which helps developers and businesses launch messaging experiences (i.e. apps) quickly, makes it easy to pass control of conversation between apps and ensures a great user experience by disallowing apps from interjecting ongoing conversations. Key improvements include \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol#how-it-works\">Exclusive mode\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol#how-it-works\">Idle mode\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol\/conversation-control\">New APIs for finer control over thread ownership\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol#how-it-works\">removing the requirement to assign primary or secondary roles for apps\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>Note that developers and businesses who currently use Handover Protocol need to implement the changes to their current Handover Protocol implementation by March 1st, 2022. Please refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol-v2#migration-guide\">migration guide\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/handover-protocol-v2#breaking-changes\">breaking changes\u003C\/a> sections for more details.\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Custom Labels API - We are making exciting updates to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/identity\/custom-labels\">Custom Labels API\u003C\/a> that would allow businesses to create, update and delete labels and sync the labels between the Facebook Page Inbox and any other tool the business might be using to communicate with their customers.\n    \u003Col>\n      \u003Cli>In order to use the Custom Labels API after October 1st, 2021 businesses need to accept our new \u003Cem>Page Contact Terms.\u003C\/em> These terms describe Meta\u2019s data practices for the Custom Labels created by the business. We will be rolling out the Page Contact Terms acceptance requirement to Facebook Pages on a rolling basis starting October 1st.\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>Graph API \u003Ccode>v12.0\u003C\/code>+ Custom Labels API \u003Ccode>name\u003C\/code> field will be replaced with \u003Ccode>page_label_name\u003C\/code>. This change will take effect on all older Graph API versions starting Dec 14, 2021. Developer should leverage \u003Ccode>page_label_name\u003C\/code> across various CRUD (Create, Retrieve, Update, Delete) API calls and webhooks.\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ol>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/europe-japan-updates\">Messenger API Updates for Europe and Japan\u003C\/a> - We have restored \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/templates\/customer-feedback-template\">Customer Feedback Template\u003C\/a> in the Messenger API that wasn\u2019t available to businesses in Europe, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally. Details \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/europe-japan-updates\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Messenger API for Instagram updates\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/webhooks\">Reaction Webhook\u003C\/a> - We have updated emoji reactions to return a new unicode format and support multiple emoji reactions. Please refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/webhooks\">developer documentation\u003C\/a> and migrate to the new version before December 14, 2021 in order to continue supporting emoji reactions.\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/user-profile\">User Profile API\u003C\/a> - We have updated User Profile API to include additional fields that are publicly available on the Instagram app. Please refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/instagram-messaging\/features\/user-profile\">developer documentation\u003C\/a> for details.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>IGID Deprecation - \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversations\">Conversation API\u003C\/a> will no longer return \u003Ccode>IGID\u003C\/code> field and fully rely on \u003Ccode>IGSID\u003C\/code> field. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/conversations\">developer documentation\u003C\/a> for details in order to migrate before December 14, 2021.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/discovery\">Facebook Chat Plugin Customization API\u003C\/a> - We are launching Chat Plugin customization settings through API.  With this new release, developers will be able to edit features including the position, color, greetings, guest mode settings, etc. that are currently only available using our first-party tools today.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/message-echoes\">Message Echo webhook\u003C\/a> will now include the app id for Facebook Page Inbox as part of Graph API \u003Ccode>v12.0\u003C\/code> - When a business responds to a Messenger conversation from Facebook Page Inbox, other apps connected to the Page can listen to the Message Echo webhook. These apps will receive an echo webhook with the Facebook Page inbox app id (\u003Ccode>263902037430900\u003C\/code>).\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26993908240203632","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1629097200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/instagram\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API for Instagram\"]},\"- Messenger API for Instagram opened up to all developers in June, with an opportunity to build for IG business accounts with follower counts between 10k-100k. Now, developers can add Instagram messaging into their apps and build Instagram messaging experiences for all businesses on Instagram. The use of Messenger API for Instagram must comply with the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/developers.facebook.com\\\/devpolicy#messengerplatform\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Developer Policies\"]},\", particularly the policies listed under \\u2018Messenger and Instagram Messaging APIs\\u2019, as well as the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/instagram\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"technical documentation\"]},\".\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"August 16, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-08-16\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Messenger API for Instagram expanded to all businesses on Instagram.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/august_16_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/instagram\">Messenger API for Instagram\u003C\/a>- Messenger API for Instagram opened up to all developers in June, with an opportunity to build for IG business accounts with follower counts between 10k-100k. Now, developers can add Instagram messaging into their apps and build Instagram messaging experiences for all businesses on Instagram. The use of Messenger API for Instagram must comply with the \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/developers.facebook.com\/devpolicy#messengerplatform\">Developer Policies\u003C\/a>, particularly the policies listed under \u2018Messenger and Instagram Messaging APIs\u2019, as well as the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/instagram\">technical documentation\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"36418296724424063","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1628578800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/europe-japan-updates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API Updates for Europe and Japan\"]},\" - We have restored many of the features in the Messenger API that weren\\u2019t available to businesses in Europe, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally. Private Reply API calls with the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/send-api\">Human Agent Tag\u003C\/a> will stop working after Sept 13, 2021.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35430867623224578","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1628060400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/webhook-events\\\/messaging_referrals\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Update on Messaging Referrals Webhook\"]},\" - We added the product_id inside ads_context_data block in the messaging_referrals webhook to allow apps to get the product ID if it is a dynamic ads.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! We added the product_id inside ads_context_data block in the messaging_referrals webhook to allow apps to get the product ID if it is a dynamic ads.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26734792742842273","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1625641200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/instagram\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API for Instagram\"]},\" -
