Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"July 7, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-07-07\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Messenger API for Instagram expanded to IG business accounts with 1K-10K followers.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/july_7_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/instagram\">Messenger API for Instagram\u003C\/a> - Messenger API for Instagram opened up to all developers in June, with an opportunity to build for IG business accounts with follower counts between 10k-100k. We are expanding the rollout to IG business accounts with follower counts between 1K-10K. Now, developers can add Instagram messaging into their apps and build Instagram messaging experiences for even more businesses. The use of Messenger API for Instagram must comply with the \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/developers.facebook.com\/devpolicy#messengerplatform\">Developer Policies\u003C\/a>, particularly the policies listed under \u2018Messenger and Instagram Messaging APIs\u2019, as well as the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/instagram\">technical documentation\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27095081270124979","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1624345200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/instagram-messaging\\\/generic-template\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Generic Templates\"]},\", which allows you to send a structured message that includes an image, text and buttons, is now available for Instagram\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/graph-api\\\/reference\\\/v10.0\\\/conversation\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Conversations API\"]},\" to fetch conversation history and then compare it with the webhook events. See more details \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/webhook-events\\\/messaging_postbacks\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\".\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/template\\\/airline\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Airline Templates are deprecated\"]}]},\"\\u00a0\",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"-\"]},\" Airline Templates will no longer be supported starting Graph API v11. Deprecation for the prior versions of the Graph API will occur 6 months after the announcement of this change on Dec 6, 2021. We recommend airlines send \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/templates\\\/airline-boarding-pass\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Boarding Pass\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/templates\\\/airline-checkin\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Check-in\"]},\" templates as images which are consistent with how they typically send these notifications in other channels.\"]}]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 8, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-06-08\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"mid added to messaging_postback events and Airline Templates deprecated.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/june_8_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>The following changes apply to v11.0+\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Adding \u003Ccode>&amp;lt;mid&amp;gt;\u003C\/code> to \u003Ccode>messaging_postback\u003C\/code> events for Messenger and Messenger API for Instagram for Graph API V11.0+\u003C\/strong> - We are adding the Message Id (\u003Ccode>&amp;lt;mid&amp;gt;\u003C\/code>) field as part of the \u003Ccode>messaging_postback\u003C\/code> payload to help reduce engineering overheads for our partners who have had to rely on the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/graph-api\/reference\/v10.0\/conversation\">Conversations API\u003C\/a> to fetch conversation history and then compare it with the webhook events. See more details \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/messaging_postbacks\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/template\/airline\">Airline Templates are deprecated\u003C\/a>\u003C\/strong>\u00a0\u003Cem>-\u003C\/em> Airline Templates will no longer be supported starting Graph API v11. Deprecation for the prior versions of the Graph API will occur 6 months after the announcement of this change on Dec 6, 2021. We recommend airlines send \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/reference\/templates\/airline-boarding-pass\">Boarding Pass\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/reference\/templates\/airline-checkin\">Check-in\u003C\/a> templates as images which are consistent with how they typically send these notifications in other channels.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27083626351274804","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1622617200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/instagram\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API for Instagram\"]},\" - We have opened up the Messenger API for Instagram to all developers who are making it possible for brands to offer messaging experiences on Instagram at scale. Now, developers can add Instagram messaging into their apps and build experiences for Instagram messaging. Developers can help businesses use different applications to leverage existing workflows, drive more meaningful conversations, increase customer satisfaction, and grow sales. Learn more \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/instagram\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\". The use of Messenger API for Instagram must comply with the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/developers.facebook.com\\\/devpolicy#messengerplatform\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Developer Policies\"]},\", particularly the policies listed under \\u2018Messenger and Instagram Messaging APIs\\u2019, as well as the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/messenger-platform\\\/instagram\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"technical documentation\"]},\".\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/send-api\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Human Agent message tag\"]},\" now available to all developers - This tag allows businesses to respond to user messages on Messenger and Instagram manually outside the 24-hour standard messaging window up to 7days. This tag is helpful especially for use cases such as weekend closures or for inquiries that need more than 24 hours to resolve. Developers should apply for the Human Agent tag permission via the App dashboard even if your app has been previously approved for Human Agent message tag. Navigate to the \\u201cPermissions and Features\\u201d section of the app dashboard and apply for the \\u201cHuman Agent\\u201d permission. Learn more \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/send-api\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\".\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/templates\\\/customer-feedback-template\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Customer Feedback Template\"]},\"\\u00a0\",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"is now available as Beta\"]},\" - We are launching a native template within Messenger that supports common survey formats such as CSAT (Customer Satisfaction), NPS (Net Promoter Score), CES (Customer Effort Score) and free form text. The native template is easier to integrate because it\\u2019s built on Send API, eliminates the need to build custom survey solutions using Webview and makes it easy for developers to aggregate scores across channels that use similar survey formats. Learn more \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/send-messages\\\/templates\\\/customer-feedback-template\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\".\"]}]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 2, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-06-02\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Messenger API for Instagram opened to all developers, Human Agent tag GA, and Customer Feedback Template beta.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/june_2_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/instagram\">Messenger API for Instagram\u003C\/a> - We have opened up the Messenger API for Instagram to all developers who are making it possible for brands to offer messaging experiences on Instagram at scale. Now, developers can add Instagram messaging into their apps and build experiences for Instagram messaging. Developers can help businesses use different applications to leverage existing workflows, drive more meaningful conversations, increase customer satisfaction, and grow sales. Learn more \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/instagram\">here\u003C\/a>. The use of Messenger API for Instagram must comply with the \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/developers.facebook.com\/devpolicy#messengerplatform\">Developer Policies\u003C\/a>, particularly the policies listed under \u2018Messenger and Instagram Messaging APIs\u2019, as well as the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/messenger-platform\/instagram\">technical documentation\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/send-api\">Human Agent message tag\u003C\/a> now available to all developers - This tag allows businesses to respond to user messages on Messenger and Instagram manually outside the 24-hour standard messaging window up to 7days. This tag is helpful especially for use cases such as weekend closures or for inquiries that need more than 24 hours to resolve. Developers should apply for the Human Agent tag permission via the App dashboard even if your app has been previously approved for Human Agent message tag. Navigate to the \u201cPermissions and Features\u201d section of the app dashboard and apply for the \u201cHuman Agent\u201d permission. Learn more \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/send-api\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/templates\/customer-feedback-template\">Customer Feedback Template\u003C\/a>\u00a0\u003Cem>is now available as Beta\u003C\/em> - We are launching a native template within Messenger that supports common survey formats such as CSAT (Customer Satisfaction), NPS (Net Promoter Score), CES (Customer Effort Score) and free form text. The native template is easier to integrate because it\u2019s built on Send API, eliminates the need to build custom survey solutions using Webview and makes it easy for developers to aggregate scores across channels that use similar survey formats. Learn more \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/send-messages\/templates\/customer-feedback-template\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26665287113081674","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1618297200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/europe-japan-updates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API Updates for Europe and Japan\"]},\" - We have restored many of the features in the Messenger API that weren\\u2019t available to businesses in Europe and Japan, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally. See the list of all restored features \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/europe-japan-updates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\".\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 13, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-04-13\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Messenger API features restored for Europe and Japan.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/april_13_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/europe-japan-updates\">Messenger API Updates for Europe and Japan\u003C\/a> - We have restored many of the features in the Messenger API that weren\u2019t available to businesses in Europe and Japan, and for people in Europe and Japan who connect with businesses globally. See the list of all restored features \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/europe-japan-updates\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27031020976569632","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1617087600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/europe-japan-updates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API Updates for Japan\"]},\" - As part of our ongoing efforts to comply with regulations under the Japan Telecom Business act, several Messenger APIs will be unavailable for developers and businesses in Japan, and for people in Japan who connect with businesses globally. These Messenger API changes are similar to the changes we announced for Europe back in December.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 30, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-03-30\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Messenger API changes for Japan Telecom Business act compliance.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/march_30_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/europe-japan-updates\">Messenger API Updates for Japan\u003C\/a> - As part of our ongoing efforts to comply with regulations under the Japan Telecom Business act, several Messenger APIs will be unavailable for developers and businesses in Japan, and for people in Japan who connect with businesses globally. These Messenger API changes are similar to the changes we announced for Europe back in December.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26486798251015715","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1608019200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/reference\\\/webhook-events\\\/messaging_referrals\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Update on Messaging Referrals Webhook\"]},\" - We added the ads_context_data block to the messaging_referrals webhook to allow apps to get the post ID, ad title, picture and video URL.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"December 15, 2020\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2020-12-15\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"ads_context_data block added to messaging_referrals webhook with post ID, ad title, and media URLs.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/december_15_2020.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/messenger-platform\/reference\/webhook-events\/messaging_referrals\">Update on Messaging Referrals Webhook\u003C\/a> - We added the ads_context_data block to the messaging_referrals webhook to allow apps to get the post ID, ad title, picture and video URL.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26831886663117800","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1606809600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/messenger-platform\\\/europe-japan-updates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messenger API Updates for Europe\"]},\" - As part of our efforts to comply with new privacy rules in Europe, we\\u2019re making updates that will impact some developers and businesses that use our Messenger API. Beginning December 16, several Messenger APIs will be unavailable for developers and businesses in Europe, and for people in Europe who connect with businesses globally.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/send-messages/template/image-grid" role="link" tabindex="0">image grid template</a>, a new <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/send-messages/templates" role="link" tabindex="0">message template</a> that displays 2 to 6 images arranged in a grid within a single message. Each image can have its own tap action that opens a URL (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">web_url</code>) or sends a postback to your webhook (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">postback</code>), and you can add an optional title, subtitle, and up to three buttons below the grid.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/send-messages/sticker-api" role="link" tabindex="0">Sticker API</a> to browse, search, and send first-party stickers through the Messenger Platform API.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>New endpoints:</strong></div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">GET /sticker_packs</code> — List available sticker packs with name, description, preview image, and sticker count.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">GET /sticker_packs/&lt;STICKER_PACK_ID&gt;/stickers</code> — List stickers within a specific pack, including id, name, image URL, and dimensions.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">GET /sticker_search?q=&lt;QUERY&gt;</code> — Search stickers by keyword across all available packs. Supports multilingual search with the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">locale</code> parameter using a <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/messenger-profile/supported-locales" role="link" tabindex="0">supported locale</a> code (for example, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">locale=vi_VN</code> for Vietnamese or <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">locale=ko_KR</code> for Korean). Defaults to <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">en_US</code>.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Send stickers:</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Use the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/send-messages/" role="link" tabindex="0">Send Messages API</a> to send a sticker with the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">sticker_id</code> field:</div><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x78zum5 x1q0g3np x1n2onr6 x1bgx8a2 x6nl9eh x1a5l9x9 x7vuprf x1mg3h75 xod5an3 xyamay9 xv54qhq x1l90r2v xf7dkkf"><pre class="_ar4n xk4td0m xj0a0fe x1lliihq x1t4azzi xh8yej3"><div style="overflow-x:auto"><pre data-lang="json">{
  &quot;recipient&quot;: {&quot;id&quot;: &quot;&lt;PSID&gt;&quot;},
  &quot;message&quot;: {&quot;sticker_id&quot;: 767226160478561}
}</pre></div></pre><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c9tyrk xeusxvb x1pahc9y x1ertn4p x1td3qas x10w6t97 x10l6tqk x131sewu x1eu8d0j" role="button" tabindex="0"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1d43ie2 xlup9mm x1kky2od" role="img"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5 14h1v2H5a3 3 0 0 1-3-3V5a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h8a3 3 0 0 1 3 3v1h-2V5a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H5a1 1 0 0 0-1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Webhook change with sticker attachment type (90-day transition):</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Sticker messages in <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/webhooks/" role="link" tabindex="0">webhooks</a> now include a new <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">type: &quot;sticker&quot;</code> attachment with <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">sticker_id</code> metadata, alongside the existing <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">type: &quot;image&quot;</code> attachment. During the 90-day transition period (until August 30, 2026), both attachment types are present in the payload. After the transition, only the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">sticker</code> attachment type will be sent.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Update your webhook handlers to recognize the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">sticker</code> attachment type before August 30, 2026. The same change applies to message echoes and Conversations API responses.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Required permissions:</strong> The catalog and search endpoints require an app access token (no additional permissions). Sending stickers requires <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">pages_messaging</code>.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div aria-controls="_R_88r9kldcpfilipamH1_" aria-expanded="true" class="x1i10hfl x1qjc9v5 xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Apr 27, 2026</div><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1heor9g xxk0z11 xvy4d1p" role="img"><path d="M20 12a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H5a1 1 0 1 1 0-2h14a1 1 0 0 1 1 1z"></path></svg></div></div><div aria-labelledby="_R_88r9kldcpfilipam_" class="x1s73dr8 x5uqrmk xua3uq3 xwji4o3" id="_R_88r9kldcpfilipamH1_" role="region" style="transition-duration:250ms"><div class="xyamay9 x1l90r2v xf7dkkf xv54qhq"><!--$--><h1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x1r28tcg x1yxlzaz xsp84uj x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The legacy <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">share</code> attachment type is being removed from Instagram post share webhook payloads. As announced on <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="#october-30--2025" role="link" tabindex="0">October 30, 2025</a>, the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">share</code> attachment has been deprecated in favor of the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_post</code> attachment type, which includes full metadata (media ID, URL, and title). This change is being rolled out gradually: webhooks will return only the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_post</code> attachment once rollout reaches your app. If your integration still relies on the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">share</code> attachment type for Instagram posts, update it to use <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_post</code> instead or contact our developer support team through <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="https://developers.facebook.com/support/" role="link" tabindex="0">Meta Developer Support Portal</a> to request exclusion of your app(s) from this change.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div sent in Messenger are now surfaced in both the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/conversations" role="link" tabindex="0">Conversations API</a> and Webhooks. Partners can access share metadata (such as url, id, type, and title) directly from their own platform without switching to Meta Business Suite.</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Conversations API</strong> — Post/Reel share messages now include type of share (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">post</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_post</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reel</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_reel</code>) with url, title and id</div></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Messages Webhook</strong> — When a customer sends a post or reel in Messenger, the messages
webhook payload includes the share metadata (title, url, id) with the corresponding type (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">post</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_post</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reel</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_reel</code>)</div></li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The Instagram Direct Send API now supports sending the images with attachment IDs (in addition to image URLs) which resolves the problem of timeouts when uploading multiple large high-quality images from slow servers. You can use the attachment API to upload the images one at a time and reuse the attachment IDs to send the same image to multiple users. See   the updated documentation for <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/instagram-messaging/features/send-message" role="link" tabindex="0">Facebook Graph API</a> for Instagram accounts linked with a Facebook page OR the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Messenger Utility Templates now support named parameters (e.g., {{customer_name}}, {{order_id}}) in addition to positional parameters ({{1}}, {{2}}). Set parameter_format to NAMED when creating a template and use the parameter_name field when sending messages. Existing templates using positional parameters are unaffected. Detailed steps on how to created templates with named parameters are listed <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x1dg8jwx xv6bue1 xex5isp xsp84uj x1j402mz x1366vqa x14imz66 xby3lk6 xcxolhg xjbavb xml9wff x16b4c32 x1yyhlu9 x1i6xp69 xvyeec0 x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Messenger Appointment Booking Data in Conversations API and Webhooks</h3><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Appointment booking data from Messenger is now surfaced in the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/conversations" role="link" tabindex="0">Conversations API</a> and
Webhooks. Partners can access appointment details — including status, scheduled time, and timezone — directly from their own platform without switching to Meta
Business Suite.</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>Conversations API</strong> — Appointment messages now include an <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">appointment_booking</code> attachment with status, start/end times, and timezone when fetching
conversation messages.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>Messages Webhook</strong> — When a customer sends an appointment booking request, the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/reference/webhook-events/messages#message-with-appointment-booking" role="link" tabindex="0">messages
webhook</a> payload includes the appointment data as an attachment with type
<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">appointment_booking</code>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>Message Echoes Webhook</strong> — When a business responds to an appointment (e.g., confirming or declining), the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/reference/webhook-events/message-echoes#appointment" role="link" tabindex="0">message_echoes
webhook</a> payload includes the updated appointment data.</li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The Messenger Calling API is now generally available. Any app with the pages_messaging permission can enable voice calling between businesses and people on Messenger via third-party integration. The API supports inbound and outbound calls using WebRTC and includes:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Call settings webhook — Receive real-time updates when a Page’s Messenger call settings change</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Call permissions API — Programmatically check a Page’s call permissions and rate limits before placing a call</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Call metrics API — Submit client-side call quality metrics for monitoring and diagnostics</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Audio call button CTA — Use the audio_call button type in generic and button message templates to prompt users to call</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Ad referral webhooks — Receive ad attribution data for calls originating from Call Prompt Ads</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww to a specific  message in Instagram Direct using the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek Instagram accounts linked with a Facebook page</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reply_to</code> object will also be available in the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/conversations" role="link" tabindex="0">Conversations API</a>. It will be non-null when the message is a reply and will indicate if it is a self reply.  This boolean flag will also be added to the reply_to object returned in the message object in Message and Echo webhooks.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">November 3, 2025: Multi-image sending is a Beta feature that will be rolled out incrementally over a few weeks . While the feature is rolled out, some Instagram accounts may get an error response <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">2534068</code></a> to indicate that the feature is not yet available for that account.</div></span></div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu x1qjc9v5 xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk x78zum5 xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr xxk0z11 xvy4d1p" role="img"><path d="M20 12a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H5a1 1 0 1 1 0-2h14a1 1 0 0 1 1 1z"></path></svg></div></div><div aria-labelledby="_R_8ur9kldcpfilipam_" class="x1s73dr8 x5uqrmk xua3uq3 xwji4o3" id="_R_8ur9kldcpfilipamH1_" role="region" style="transition-duration:250ms"><div class="xyamay9 x1l90r2v xf7dkkf xv54qhq"><!--$--><h1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x1r28tcg x1yxlzaz xsp84uj x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Starting November 3, 2025, the webhook payload for Instagram post shares will include two attachments: the existing <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">share</code> attachment and a new <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_post</code> attachment. The payload now provides additional metadata, including media ID, URL, and title (caption).</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">If this change is not compatible with your app and you need more time to make updates, please contact our developer support team via the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="https://developers.facebook.com/support/" role="link" tabindex="0">Meta Developer Support Portal</a> to request exclusion of your app(s) from this change until you make the necessary updates to support the new attachment type.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The old <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">share</code> attachment type will continue to be supported for Instagram posts until <strong>February 1, 2026</strong>, after which it will be removed. Partners and integrators are encouraged to migrate to the new <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_post</code> attachment type as soon as possible. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/instagram-platform/webhooks/new" role="link" tabindex="0">here</a> for before and after payload sample.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/conversations" role="link" tabindex="0">Messenger Conversations API</a> response when the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">shares</code> message <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/graph-api/reference/v24.0/message#readfields" role="link" tabindex="0">field</a> is specified. The response provides both the stickerID and url for the AI generated sticker in the message.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div aria-controls="_R_92r9kldcpfilipamH1_" aria-expanded="true" class="x1i10hfl x1qjc9v5 xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk x78zum5 xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli x1n2onr6 x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1hl2dhg x1lku1pv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek x1y1aw1k xwib8y2 x1g0dm76 xpdmqnj xh8yej3" id="_R_92r9kldcpfilipam_" role="button" tabindex="0"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x78zum5 x1qughib"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx xjliv6m x1ij0wma xsp84uj x1uc5f31 x1366vqa x166pohu xu0txxm xcxolhg xwczod1 xml9wff xjlskvi x1kanymm x1i6xp69 xr4g9wi x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Oct 23, 2025</div><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1heor9g xxk0z11 xvy4d1p" role="img"><path d="M20 12a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H5a1 1 0 1 1 0-2h14a1 1 0 0 1 1 1z"></path></svg></div></div><div aria-labelledby="_R_92r9kldcpfilipam_" class="x1s73dr8 x5uqrmk xua3uq3 xwji4o3" id="_R_92r9kldcpfilipamH1_" role="region" style="transition-duration:250ms"><div class="xyamay9 x1l90r2v xf7dkkf xv54qhq"><!--$--><h1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x1r28tcg x1yxlzaz xsp84uj x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Meta no longer supports the Handover Protocol for Instagram. All businesses have been migrated to <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/instagram-messaging/features/conversation-routing" role="link" tabindex="0">Conversation Routing</a>. Conversation Routing is backwards compatible with most Handover Protocol APIs and functionalities, and is expected to function without interruption.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/instagram-messaging/features/moderate-conversations" role="link" tabindex="0">Instagram Moderate Conversations API</a> is now available.
This new API will allow businesses to block users, unblock users, and move conversations to the spam folder in Meta Business Suite Inbox for the Instagram platform. Previously, these actions could only be completed on the Instagram app or Meta Business Suite.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/conversations#conversation-ownership-filtering" role="link" tabindex="0">Conversations API</a> now supports an <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">is_owner</code> field for both Messenger and Instagram. This field indicates if the app making the request is the current thread owner of the conversation or not, and is only returned when <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl role="link" tabindex="0">Conversation Routing</a> is enabled.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Benefits:</div><ol class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 x3yw8vx"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Filter and respond only to conversations your app owns.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww threads.</li></span></ol><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reply_to</code> is now available in the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/conversations" role="link" tabindex="0">Conversations API</a>. It will be non-null when a message is a reply and will indicate if it is a self reply.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">In addition to <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">mid</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">text</code>, the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reply_to</code> object will also be returned in the message object in <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/reference/webhook-events/messages" role="link" tabindex="0">Message</a> and <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/reference/webhook-events/message-echoes" role="link" tabindex="0">Echo</a> webhooks. The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reply_to</code> object will be populated with the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">mid</code> that the message is replying to and will contain a boolean field <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">is_self_reply</code> that indicates whether the message is a self reply or just a reply.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" href="/documentation/business-messaging/instagram-messaging/features/conversation-routing?locale=en_US#extended-thread-control-window" role="link" tabindex="0">Custom thread control window</a> for Click To Instagram Ads is now available. When a conversation starts from an ad, the app controls the thread for 24 hours from the last user message, extendable up to 30 days by setting <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">receiving_app_control_expiration</code>. Invalid values or Conversation Control actions reset the window to 1 day.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/messenger-platform/handover-protocol/messenger-lead-ads-hop" role="link" tabindex="0">Custom thread control window</a> for Click To Messenger Ads is now available. When a conversation starts from an ad, the app controls the thread for 24 hours from the last user message, extendable up to 30 days by setting <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">receiving_app_control_expiration</code>. Invalid values or Conversation Control actions reset the window to 1 day.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messaging_referrals</code> webhook now contains flow ID.
The webhook event contains a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">flow_id</code> field when an ad referral originates from an ad with a <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/ads/ads-welcome-message-flows" role="link" tabindex="0">Welcome Message flow</a>. This is available in the ad referral object of the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messages</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messaging_postbacks</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messaging_referrals</code> webhooks. See more details about the webhook <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_reel</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reel</code> will now be supported attachment types in a messages webhook. IG reel attachments will have type <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ig_reel</code>, and the attachment payload will include the title, url, and video id for the reel. FB reel attachments will have type <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reel</code>, and the attachment payload will include the title, url, and video id for the reel.</div><div Reel attachments will be categorized as type <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reel</code> and the attachment payload will include the title, URL, and video ID of the reel.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Commands are tappable keywords that the user can invoke at any time to perform specific actions within the Messenger experience. Commands are composed of the command itself and a hint, which educates the user on what it does. For example, when a user types “help me book <strong>flights</strong> and <strong>hotels</strong> to Mexico for the last week of december,” they are invoking the flights and hotels commands configured by the travel business. Learn more <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Conversation Routing is now available for Instagram. Conversation Routing allows Meta to route conversations between your business and customers, or prospective customers, to the app that you have specified to respond in the conversation. This routing allows your business to create rich conversations with people and to minimize API calls to Meta’s servers.</div><div id="documentheading-3-custom-labels-and-personas-apis"><div snippet. The welcome message will appear as a dropdown in ads manager when creating the Click to Messenger and Click to Instagram Direct ad. <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">As a business, you may use multiple third-party messaging providers for different conversations with your customers, like lead generation, marketing offers about your products, or customer support questions. Conversation routing lets you define which partners control customer conversations at a particular time, so that customers get the information they need. You can create and manage message routing rules in your Page settings.</div><div id="documentheading-3-button-template-for-instagram"><div id="button-template-for-instagram" x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The button template sends a text message with up to three attached buttons. This template is useful for offering the message recipient options to choose from, such as predetermined responses to a question, or actions to take. Supported button types are <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">postback</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">web_url</code>.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">title</code> property for <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/messenger-platform/send-messages/recurring-notifications#request-permission-to-send-recurring-notifications" role="link" tabindex="0">recurring notification opt in requests</a> is <strong>no longer required</strong>. If <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">title</code> is not set, the value defaults to “Updates and promotions”. This change applies to opt in requests sent from a Facebook Page or Instagram Professional accounts.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div aria-controls="_R_b2r9kldcpfilipamH1_" aria-expanded="true" class="x1i10hfl x1qjc9v5 xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk x78zum5 xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli x1n2onr6 x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1hl2dhg x1lku1pv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek x1y1aw1k xwib8y2 x1g0dm76 xpdmqnj xh8yej3" id="_R_b2r9kldcpfilipam_" role="button" tabindex="0"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x78zum5 x1qughib"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx xjliv6m x1ij0wma xsp84uj x1uc5f31 x1366vqa x166pohu xu0txxm xcxolhg xwczod1 xml9wff xjlskvi x1kanymm x1i6xp69 xr4g9wi x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Feb 2, 2023</div><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1heor9g xxk0z11 xvy4d1p" role="img"><path d="M20 12a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H5a1 1 0 1 1 0-2h14a1 1 0 0 1 1 1z"></path></svg></div></div><div aria-labelledby="_R_b2r9kldcpfilipam_" class="x1s73dr8 x5uqrmk xua3uq3 xwji4o3" id="_R_b2r9kldcpfilipamH1_" role="region" style="transition-duration:250ms"><div class="xyamay9 x1l90r2v xf7dkkf xv54qhq"><!--$--><h1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x1r28tcg x1yxlzaz xsp84uj x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">

x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 notifications. However, notification message tokens created before Feb. 2, 2023 for weekly or monthly recurring notifications will be supported and the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">notification_message_frequency</code> will be returned in webhook notifications.</div><div id="documentheading-4-followup-messages-for-opt-ins"><div id="followup-messages-for-opt-ins" x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x1mzt3pk">next_eligible_time</code> property</a> for Notification Message Token endpoints is now available. This field returns the time at which you are able to send the next recurring notification using that notification message token.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">
Messenger API for Instagram
</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">A new <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/discovery/lead-generation-ads-in-messenger#webhooks" role="link" tabindex="0">Referral Webhook for  Click to Messenger, Lead Gen ads</a> that include the lead information.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Improvements to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/messenger-platform/handover-protocol/messenger-lead-ads-hop" role="link" tabindex="0">Handover Protocol</a>. Advertisers can now select which app they want to route completed leads. Additionally, for apps that haven’t yet implemented these app notifications, an <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/messenger-platform/discovery/lead-generation-ads-in-messenger#connnectapp" role="link" tabindex="0">optional summary message</a> can be enabled, to send lead information to that app in the form of a regular message.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Since referral or summary events are triggered while the standard messaging window is open, apps can use this to follow-up with leads directly in Messenger, upsell them to <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/messenger-platform/send-messages/recurring-notifications" role="link" tabindex="0">Recurring Notifications</a> or have them book an appointment or call the business directly.</li></span></ul><div id="documentheading-4-messaging-events-api"><div id="messaging-events-api" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 x1r0jzty x17zd0t2 xyamay9"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><b>Recurring Notifications for Messenger API</b><br/><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5
